entry.name: widgetIcon
entry.label: Custom icon for the compact widget button.

entry.name: showOnlyCurrentMonitor
entry.label: Show only open windows from the current monitor.

entry.name: showOnlyCurrentVirtualDesktop
entry.label: Show only open windows from the current virtual desktop.

entry.name: cursorBorderColor
entry.label: Border color used for the selected or hovered tile.

entry.name: usePlasmaSearchPlugins
entry.label: Use KDE Plasma search plugins through KRunner.
